10.code:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

result = add(5, 3)
print(result)

11.title: Lambda Function
11.code:

print(add(2, 3))

20.title: SQLite Database
20.code:
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect('test.db')
c = conn.cursor()
c.execute('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users(name TEXT)')
c.execute("INSERT INTO users VALUES('Raj')")
conn.commit()
conn.close()

23.title: Multithreading
23.code:
import threading

def task():
    print('Running in thread')

t = threading.Thread(target=task)
t.start()
t.join()

24.title: Async Programming
24.code:
import asyncio

async def main():
    print('Hello Async')

asyncio.run(main())
